description: POTAL v3 pipeline complete reference data for 9-field extraction

material_keywords.description: Material keyword groups. Maps primary material names to variant spellings.

material_to_section.description: Material → HS Section mapping with confidence scores.

passive_accessory_words.description: Passive accessory words — when present, material overrides electronics category.

article_keywords.description: Article keywords — indicate finished products (vs raw materials) for Section XV chapter selection.

keyword_to_headings.description: Product keyword → Heading code(s) mapping. Seller vocabulary → HS 4-digit heading.

subheading_synonyms.description: Subheading synonym dictionary. Seller product keywords → 6-digit HS codes.

heading_descriptions.description: 1,233 Heading codes → official HS description text.
